fields.description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.


OVERVIEW

Snowflake is about empowering enterprises to achieve their full potential and people too. With a culture that's all in on impact, innovation, and collaboration, Snowflake is the sweet spot for building big, moving fast, and taking technology and careers to the next level.

Snowflake is seeking a Director of AI & Data Enterprise Architecture to lead a specialized team providing expert technical guidance for complex cloud integration and strategic scenarios. The ideal executive combines deep technical and hands-on AI development experience to help enterprises modernize data and AI infrastructure and navigate competitive landscapes.

Reporting to the VP of Solutions Engineering, this leader will guide customers through transformational journeys across AWS, Azure, GCP, and Data Platform environments, delivering strategic architectural guidance to accelerate adoption and drive measurable business outcomes. The role intersects platform architecture, data intelligence, and AI solutions.

This role requires a unique blend of executive leadership presence and technical depth, someone who can architect sophisticated AI/ML solutions while also influencing C-level technology decisions across Fortune 500 enterprises.


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Strategic Architecture Leadership

 - Lead and scale a high-performing Enterprise Architect team providing expert technical guidance for L400/L500 platform and architecture-focused customer engagements

 - Define and execute strategic cloud integration planning across major Cloud Service Providers (AWS, Azure, GCP) and ecosystem platforms

 - Drive proof-of-concept execution and hands-on technical support for complex migration and modernization initiatives

 - Develop reusable technical assets including presentations, architecture diagrams, and reference implementations

AI & Data Platform Expertise

 - Provide hands-on technical leadership in designing and implementing modern AI/ML architectures on Snowflake

 - Guide customers in migrating from legacy platforms to cloud-native, AI-ready data architectures.

 - Architect solutions leveraging Snowflake Cortex, ML capabilities, and integration with leading AI frameworks

 - Deliver technical guidance on building production-grade AI applications, data pipelines, and analytics platforms

 - Design secure AI/ML architectures with appropriate governance controls, including LLM safety guardrails and data privacy protections

 - Design end-to-end MLOps and LLMOps pipelines including model training, evaluation, deployment, and monitoring at enterprise scale

 - Architect RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems, agentic workflows, and multi-model orchestration patterns

 - Evaluate AI & Platform build vs. buy decisions, including cost modeling for inference, fine-tuning, and managed AI services

Competitive Technical Analysis

 - Lead competitive technical analysis and develop strategic positioning for complex, multi-platform customer environments

 - Build deep expertise in competitive cloud data platforms and articulate Snowflake's differentiated value proposition

 - Create technical battle cards, competitive playbooks, and strategic guidance for field teams

 - Partner with Product and Engineering to inform roadmap priorities based on competitive landscape

Executive Engagement & Strategic Advisory

 - Serve as a trusted technical advisor to customer executives navigating complex data and AI transformation initiatives

 - Lead high-stakes customer engagements where architectural decisions have significant strategic implications

 - Build and maintain relationships with key customer stakeholders and technology decision-makers

 - Represent Snowflake at industry events, executive briefings, and strategic customer forums

 - Guide customers through AI investment decisions with ROI frameworks, TCO analysis, and business case development




Team Development & Operational Excellence

 - Build, mentor, and scale a world-class team of enterprise architects with expertise spanning cloud platforms, AI/ML, and competitive analysis

 - Establish scalable processes for team member engagement including request intake, prioritization, and account strategy alignment

 - Drive knowledge sharing and continuous learning across the architecture team

 - Partner with Sales, Customer Success, and Product teams to maximize customer outcomes

ON DAY ONE WE WILL EXPECT YOU TO HAVE

 - 15+ years of experience in enterprise architecture, solutions engineering, or technical leadership roles with progressive responsibility

 - 5+ years of people management experience, including building and leading high-performing technical teams in high-growth environments

 - Deep hands-on experience with modern AI/ML development, including familiarity with LLMs, ML pipelines, and AI application architecture

 - Expert-level knowledge of cloud data platforms (Snowflake, Databricks, AWS, Azure, GCP) with ability to architect complex multi-cloud solutions

 - Proven track record of influencing executive-level technology decisions at Fortune 500 enterprises

 - Understanding of AI governance, data privacy, and compliance requirements for enterprise AI deployments

 - Strong technical foundation including SQL mastery, Python/data engineering skills, and experience with modern data stack technologies

 - Experience with competitive selling in complex enterprise deals involving platform displacement or co-existence strategies

 - Expertise in modern AI architecture patterns: MLOps/LLMOps pipelines, RAG systems, vector databases, and agentic frameworks

 - Track record of building AI business cases, TCO models, and demonstrating measurable ROI from AI investments

 - Exceptional communication skills with ability to translate complex technical concepts for executive audiences

 - Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical field; advanced degree preferred

Preferred Qualifications:

 - Experience leading architecture practices at major cloud providers or enterprise software companies

 - Published thought leadership in data architecture, AI/ML, or cloud transformation

 - Direct experience architecting and deploying production AI/ML systems at scale

 - Background in professional services, consulting, or customer-facing technical roles

Every Snowflake employee is expected to follow the company’s confidentiality and security standards for handling sensitive data. Snowflake employees must abide by the company’s data security plan as an essential part of their duties. It is every employee's duty to keep customer information secure and confidential.

Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.

How do you want to make your impact?

For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com http://careers.snowflake.com
fields.title: Director, AI & Data Enterprise Architecture
